title: solanum morella var. schultesii
intro: Solanum morella var. schultesii, also known as the Schultes' Black Nightshade, is a plant species in the Solanaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating digestive issues. It can be prepared for medicinal use in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
